intro: reaches deep within, touching the wellspring of rage and fury
embraces the darkness within, channeling raw emotion and anger
delves into the shadowed depths of their soul, drawing upon forbidden power
surrenders to passion and anger, letting darkness flow through them
taps into the primal fury that lurks beneath the surface
manifestation: The air crackles with malevolent energy as shadows seem to deepen around them
A palpable aura of menace radiates outward, making the Force itself recoil
Dark energy writhes and coils around their form like living smoke
The temperature drops as the Force bends unnaturally to their will
Reality warps subtly, corrupted by the touch of the dark side

intro: reaches out with their mind, touching the consciousness around them
extends their awareness beyond their body, sensing thoughts and emotions
opens themselves to the Force, their consciousness expanding outward
sends tendrils of thought through the Force, seeking connection
projects their will into the minds of others through invisible threads of power
manifestation: An invisible presence brushes against the minds of those nearby
The Force flows like water between minds, carrying thoughts and intentions
Reality seems to shimmer as mental energy permeates the space
A subtle pressure builds in the minds of those touched by the power
The boundary between self and other blurs for just a moment

intro: reaches out with invisible hands of Force energy
extends their will into the physical world, grasping objects with pure thought
channels the Force into a tangible extension of themselves
focuses on the objects around them, bending reality to their will
calls upon the Force to manipulate the material world
manifestation: Objects tremble and rise as if gripped by unseen hands
The air ripples visibly as waves of telekinetic force radiate outward
Reality bends as matter yields to the power of pure will
Items shift and hover, defying gravity through Force manipulation
The Force manifests as a tangible pressure moving through space

intro: focuses inward, enhancing their physical form with Force energy
channels the Force through their body, transcending mortal limitations
draws upon the Living Force to augment their capabilities
becomes one with the Force, body and energy flowing together
taps into reservoirs of power deep within themselves
manifestation: Their movements take on an otherworldly grace and precision
Energy courses through their veins, visible as a faint aura
They move with impossible speed and strength, defying natural limits
The Force suffuses their being, elevating them beyond mere flesh
Power radiates from them as they transcend their physical form

intro: reaches out with gentle tendrils of healing energy
channels the Living Force into wounds and injuries
focuses their compassion into restorative power
touches the broken flesh with light-side energy
calls upon the Force to mend what has been torn
manifestation: A warm, soothing energy flows into the injured
Wounds begin to knit and close with unnatural speed
The healing light of the Force banishes pain and damage
Vitality returns as the Force restores what was lost
Life energy pulses and flows, reversing injury and trauma

intro: wraps themselves in protective layers of Force energy
creates a barrier between themselves and harm
channels defensive power into an invisible shield
focuses their will into a protective cocoon of energy
draws the Force around themselves like armor
manifestation: An invisible barrier shimmers into existence around them
The Force forms a protective shell, deflecting danger
Energy crackles and flows in defensive patterns
Reality bends around them, creating a pocket of safety
The air hardens into an impenetrable barrier of pure will

intro: channels the Living Force through their very cells and tissues
connects to the fundamental life energy that sustains all beings
manipulates the biological processes through Force mastery
touches the essence of life itself, bending it to their purpose
harmonizes their body with the cosmic rhythm of the Force
manifestation: Their body glows with an inner radiance as life energy surges
Cellular structure shifts and adapts beyond natural capability
The Force flows through them like a rushing river of vitality
Their physical form responds to commands that transcend biology
Life energy manifests visibly, wreathing them in living light

Ballistakinesis.description: use The Force to spray an area with dangerous debris
Ballistakinesis.manifestation: The Force gathers in a visible ripple around the user before resolving into the power.

Battle Strike.description: channels raw Force energy into their next strike, empowering it with devastating power
Battle Strike.manifestation: Their weapon or fist blazes with azure Force energy, promising tremendous impact

Blind.description: hurl dirt, dust, and debris at your foe, affecting its sight
Blind.manifestation: The air shimmers and sight-lines distort around the target.

Cloak.description: bends light and perception around themselves, fading from view
Cloak.manifestation: They seem to blur and fade, becoming nearly invisible as the Force shields them from sight

Combustion.description: use The Force to agitate particles in the air to create a pyrokinetic spray of sparks
Combustion.manifestation: The Force gathers in a visible ripple around the user before resolving into the power.

Convection.description: alter your body chemistry, causing your skin to burn with incredible heat
Convection.manifestation: The Force gathers in a visible ripple around the user before resolving into the power.

Corruption.description: use The Force to send a bolt of pure Dark Side vilness into an enemy
Corruption.manifestation: The surrounding air darkens as aggressive Force energy coils outward.

Crucitorn.description: ignore the debilitating effects of pain and focus through trauma
Crucitorn.manifestation: The Force gathers in a visible ripple around the user before resolving into the power.

Cryokinesis.description: can use The Force to draw heat away from a target, causing its temperature to drop rapidly
Cryokinesis.manifestation: The Force gathers in a visible ripple around the user before resolving into the power.

Dark Rage.description: become enraged as the Dark Side flows through you
Dark Rage.manifestation: The surrounding air darkens as aggressive Force energy coils outward.

Dark Transfer.description: use The Dark Side of The Force to restore vitality to a living ally
Dark Transfer.manifestation: A steady glow of living Force energy gathers around the target.

Detonate.description: can perceive points of weakness within an object and use The Force to telekinetically press on one of those points, shattering the object
Detonate.manifestation: The Force gathers in a visible ripple around the user before resolving into the power.

Drain Energy.description: extends dark tendrils of Force power to corrupt and drain technological systems
Drain Energy.manifestation: Dark lightning arcs toward machinery, causing circuits to overload and systems to fail catastrophically

Energy Resistance.description: use The Force to protect you from damage caused by energy, sonic, fire, cold, and electrical sources
Energy Resistance.manifestation: The Force gathers in a visible ripple around the user before resolving into the power.

Enlighten.description: reach out to an ally telepathically, sharing visions of the near future to give the ally an edge or to protect the ally from harm
Enlighten.manifestation: A steady glow of living Force energy gathers around the target.

Farseeing.description: casts their perception across vast distances and through time itself
Farseeing.manifestation: Their eyes glow faintly as visions of distant places and times fill their mind

Fear.description: summon The Dark Side to instill fear in your enemies
Fear.manifestation: The surrounding air darkens as aggressive Force energy coils outward.

Fold Space.description: can use The Force to bend space, transporting an object almost instantaneously from one place to another
Fold Space.manifestation: Space and matter bend as invisible Force pressure redirects motion.

Force Blast.description: use The Force to create a ball of compressed air and debris that you can hurl at enemy targets
Force Blast.manifestation: The Force gathers in a visible ripple around the user before resolving into the power.

Force Disarm.description: seizes their opponent's weapon with invisible Force hands and tears it away
Force Disarm.manifestation: The weapon flies from the target's grasp as if yanked by unseen hands

Force Grip.description: reaches out with invisible hands to crush and choke their target
Force Grip.manifestation: The victim rises into the air, clutching at their throat as an invisible force constricts around them

Force Light.description: can draw The Force into yourself, turning you into a beacon of light that purges the taint of The Dark Side
Force Light.manifestation: A steady glow of living Force energy gathers around the target.

Force Lightning.description: summons arcs of devastating Force Lightning from their fingertips
Force Lightning.manifestation: Blue-white electricity crackles and arcs through the air, illuminating everything with its terrible power

Force Scream.description: releases a devastating shockwave of pure dark side rage
Force Scream.manifestation: Reality itself seems to shatter as the Force-amplified scream tears through the area

Force Shield.description: use The Force to create a bubble of telekinetic energy around yourself, protecting you from harm
Force Shield.manifestation: The Force gathers in a visible ripple around the user before resolving into the power.

Force Slam.description: hurls their target through the air with overwhelming telekinetic force
Force Slam.manifestation: The target is violently thrown backwards as if struck by a giant invisible fist

Force Storm.description: conjures a massive storm of Force energy and lightning
Force Storm.manifestation: The sky darkens as reality itself tears apart, unleashing a maelstrom of destructive power

Force Storm (FUCG).description: use The Force to create a swirling whirlwind of Dark Side energy around yourself
Force Storm (FUCG).manifestation: Force energy crackles visibly as the power takes shape.

Force Stun.description: overwhelms their target's mind with telepathic pressure, freezing them in place
Force Stun.manifestation: The victim's eyes go blank as their nervous system locks up, paralyzed by mental assault

Force Thrust.description: unleashes an explosive wave of telekinetic force to hurl enemies away
Force Thrust.manifestation: A concussive blast of invisible energy erupts outward, sending targets flying

Force Track.description: places an invisible Force mark on their quarry, allowing them to hunt across any distance
Force Track.manifestation: An imperceptible thread of Force energy connects hunter to prey, stretching across space itself

Force Whirlwind.description: call upon The Force to surround an enemy in a swirling vortex of Force energy
Force Whirlwind.manifestation: Space and matter bend as invisible Force pressure redirects motion.

Hatred.description: give yourself over to The Dark Side, letting your hate radiate out from your body in palpable waves
Hatred.manifestation: The surrounding air darkens as aggressive Force energy coils outward.

Inertia.description: can use The Force to shift your body's inertia, allowing you to perform impossible stunts
Inertia.manifestation: The Force gathers in a visible ripple around the user before resolving into the power.

Inspire.description: sends a surge of confidence and courage through the Force to bolster an ally
Inspire.manifestation: The recipient stands taller as renewed determination fills their spirit

Intercept.description: use The Force to telekinetically hurl a small object in the path of an incoming projectile, preventing it from striking you
Intercept.manifestation: The Force gathers in a visible ripple around the user before resolving into the power.

Ionize.description: call upon The Force to overload electrical systems and Droids, damaging or even destroying the unit
Ionize.manifestation: The Force gathers in a visible ripple around the user before resolving into the power.

Kinetic Combat.description: use The Force to manipulate your chosen Weapon, allowing it to operate independent of your grasp
Kinetic Combat.manifestation: The Force gathers in a visible ripple around the user before resolving into the power.

Levitate.description: can float up or down without anything or anyone to assist you
Levitate.manifestation: Space and matter bend as invisible Force pressure redirects motion.

Lightning Burst.description: call upon The Dark Side to cause lightning to arc out from your body, striking adjacent enemies
Lightning Burst.manifestation: Force energy crackles visibly as the power takes shape.

Malacia.description: disrupts their opponent's equilibrium and inner balance through gentle Force manipulation
Malacia.manifestation: The target staggers and reels as their sense of balance betrays them, overcome by nausea

Memory Walk.description: torment an enemy by causing them to relive their most horrible memories
Memory Walk.manifestation: The surrounding air darkens as aggressive Force energy coils outward.

Mind Shard.description: use The Force to splinter the mind of an opponent, wracking it with pain
Mind Shard.manifestation: The Force gathers in a visible ripple around the user before resolving into the power.

Mind Trick.description: weaves subtle suggestions into the mind of their target
Mind Trick.manifestation: A glazed look passes over the target's eyes as their will bends to the Force user's words

Morichro.description: slow the vital functions of a target, causing them to slip into a deep sleep or even die
Morichro.manifestation: The Force gathers in a visible ripple around the user before resolving into the power.

Move Object.description: lifts and manipulates objects through the air with telekinetic power
Move Object.manifestation: Objects float and dance through the air, moving with graceful precision guided by thought alone

Negate Energy.description: creates a protective barrier that absorbs and disperses incoming energy attacks
Negate Energy.manifestation: Energy blasts dissipate harmlessly against an invisible shield, their power neutralized

Obscure.description: use The Force to cloud an enemy's mind, making it harder for the enemy to see its target
Obscure.manifestation: The air shimmers and sight-lines distort around the target.

Phase.description: can pass through solid objects, such as walls and doors
Phase.manifestation: Space and matter bend as invisible Force pressure redirects motion.

Plant Surge.description: reach out with The Force to entreat the aid of plants, causing them to lash out at your opponents
Plant Surge.manifestation: The Force gathers in a visible ripple around the user before resolving into the power.

Prescience.description: The Force grants you a flash of insight in dealing with your enemies
Prescience.manifestation: The Force gathers in a visible ripple around the user before resolving into the power.

Rebuke.description: projects a wave of Force energy to push back and stun opponents
Rebuke.manifestation: An invisible wave of power radiates outward, staggering all in its path

Rend.description: can move a single target, whether it is a creature or object, in two different directions simultaneously
Rend.manifestation: The Force gathers in a visible ripple around the user before resolving into the power.

Repulse.description: use The Force to clear an area around yourself
Repulse.manifestation: Space and matter bend as invisible Force pressure redirects motion.

Resist Force.description: use The Force to protect yourself from an opponent's Force Powers
Resist Force.manifestation: The Force gathers in a visible ripple around the user before resolving into the power.

Sever Force.description: tears away another's connection to the Force itself
Sever Force.manifestation: Invisible threads of Force energy are severed, leaving the victim cut off from the cosmic power

Shatterpoint.description: can see the critical point of something, whether it is a person or object, that would shatter if struck at the right time
Shatterpoint.manifestation: The Force gathers in a visible ripple around the user before resolving into the power.

Slow.description: The Force enables you to slow your targets as if they are encumbered by an extremely heavy load, making it difficult for them to move
Slow.manifestation: The Force gathers in a visible ripple around the user before resolving into the power.

Stagger.description: use The Force to lash out at a nearby enemy, causing it to stumble
Stagger.manifestation: The Force gathers in a visible ripple around the user before resolving into the power.

Surge.description: floods their muscles with explosive Force energy for a burst of superhuman speed
Surge.manifestation: They blur into motion, moving with speed that defies mortal limits

Technometry.description: can tap into and read technological devices and, in some cases, control them
Technometry.manifestation: The Force gathers in a visible ripple around the user before resolving into the power.

Thought Bomb.description: use The Force to radiate out harmful waves of telepathy, damaging the minds of nearby foes
Thought Bomb.manifestation: The surrounding air darkens as aggressive Force energy coils outward.

Valor.description: call upon the strength of The Force, reaching out to your ally and sharing your strength with them
Valor.manifestation: A steady glow of living Force energy gathers around the target.

Vital Transfer.description: transfers their own life energy to heal another
Vital Transfer.manifestation: Golden light flows between Force user and recipient, carrying healing energy

Wound.description: cause spasms in the lungs of your targets, painfully injuring them
Wound.manifestation: The surrounding air darkens as aggressive Force energy coils outward.
